enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder about his day: dropping off a broken laptop at the store, buying a replacement USB keyboard, visiting his mom for veggie soup and watching the TV show Outlander, working on his website, and listening to Donald Trump videos while expressing support for Bernie Sanders.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Bernie is a genuinely good politician and the right choice
Listening to him is depressing and drags you down
Pushes back on the idea that there are no good politicians, citing Bernie as evidence
